summary: Comprehensive verification testing of Pinnacle.AI AEO platform completed successfully. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%), and all frontend flows verified working correctly including auth, dashboard, navigation, and all feature pages.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status with database connected
User registration at /api/auth/register works correctly
User login at /api/auth/login returns JWT token
Invalid login credentials return 401
All protected routes require authentication (audit, ai-test, monitor, reports, advanced, simulate, compare, executive-summary)
AEO Audit endpoint /api/audit creates and lists audits
AI Test endpoint /api/ai-test runs citation tests and validates query input
Monitor endpoint /api/monitor adds and lists monitored pages
Reports endpoints /api/reports/overview, /trends, /competitors work correctly
Advanced Audit /api/audit/advanced returns detailed analysis
Strategy Simulator /api/simulate-strategy simulates improvements
Invalid strategy correctly rejected with 400
Enterprise Compare /api/enterprise/compare handles competitor analysis
Enterprise Sensitivity Test works with different modes
Executive Summary /api/enterprise/executive-summary returns health data
Frontend landing page displays correctly with 'Pinnacle.ai' branding
Get Started and Sign In buttons visible and functional
Login page with glassmorphism design loads correctly
Login form validates and authenticates properly
Invalid login shows error message
Dashboard loads after authentication with user greeting
Dashboard shows System Operational health badge
Dashboard displays stat cards (Page Audits, AI Tests, Monitored Pages, Changes)
Dashboard shows Recent Audits and Recent AI Tests sections
Navigation to Audits page works
Navigation to AI Tests page works
Navigation to Monitor page works
Navigation to Reports page works
Navigation to Advanced page works
Navigation to Simulate page works
Navigation to Compare page (Competitor Intelligence) works
Navigation to Summary page (Executive Summary) works
Sign Out returns user to login page
Register page accessible from login page
Switch between login and register pages works
seed_data_creation: Test user created: test@pinnacle.ai with password Test123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working in iteration 5. Test user test@pinnacle.ai exists. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_pinnacle_api.py can be rerun for regression. All 9 phases of the application are functional.
